page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A FIJI Macro for quantifying pattern in extracellular matrix.

Welcome to The Worklfow Of Matrix BioLogy Informatics (TWOMBLI). Twombli is a Fiji plugin. To get started download the TWOMBLI folder to your computer.
